title: Set of 6 Glass Tea Light Candle Holders, Tulip Tealight Holders for Table Centerpiece, Votive Candle Holders for Christmas, Wedding, Birthday Party, Home Decor (Clear)
features: 🕯️【Elegant Tulip Design】Inspired by the natural beauty of tulips, these glass tea light candle holders bring a refined decorative touch. The tulip-shaped design adds a soft, floral charm, making them perfect for both seasonal décor and everyday use.

🕯️【Quality Glass Material】Made of durable glass with a clear and smooth finish, the tealight holders combine elegance with reliability. Their sturdy construction is heat-resistant and ensures safe use with standard tealights or votive candles.

🕯️【Versatile Decoration】These small glass candle holders are ideal for table centerpieces, mantel displays, or shelf styling. Their compact size allows them to blend easily with flowers, greenery, or other decorative accents.

🕯️【Atmospheric Glow】When lit, these glass tealight holders create a warm and inviting glow that enhances any space. They are perfect for weddings, Christmas, Valentine’s Day dinners, birthday parties, or cozy evenings at home.

🕯️【Multiple Color Options】Available in clear, frosted, orange, and pink, these tulip-shaped tea candle holders cater to different tastes and moods, making them a thoughtful gift for housewarmings, holidays, or special occasions.
description: 🔍 Specifications Brand: YoHyien Product Name: Tea Light Candle Holders Material: Glass 📋 User Guide Functions: Glass Jars for Candles or Fairy Lights Usage Scenarios: Weddings, Christmas, Valentine's Day Dinners, Birthday Parties ⭐ Features ● These votive candle holders feature a tulip-shaped design that adds a soft and refined decorative accent. Available in four variations—clear, frosted, orange, and pink—they provide versatile choices to match different interiors and occasions. ● Crafted from high-quality glass, the tealight candle holders combine durability with beauty. Their clear and smooth surface ensures safe use with tealights or votive candles, while the tulip form diffuses light softly, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. ● Whether used for weddings, Christmas, Valentine’s Day dinners, or casual evenings at home, these glass tealight candle holders bring both elegance and coziness to any setting. With their charming floral shape and multiple color options, they also make a thoughtful gift for housewarmings, holidays, and special occasions. 🎁 Includes 6 × Glass Tea Light Candle Holders
